name: Baked Flounder (English)
recipeInstructions:
If necessary, 4 small plaice can be substituted for the flounders.
Set oven to 450°F or Mark 8. Wash and dry the flounders. Mix the herbs and nutmeg together.
Butter an ovenproof dish and coat with the herb mixture. Arrange the fish in the dish and pour the wine over it.
Season to taste. Melt 1 oz of butter, pour onto the fish, and cover with the breadcrumbs.
Dot the remaining butter on top and bake for 10 to 15 minutes, near the top of the oven, until the breadcrumbs are brown. If they look dry, add a little extra butter.
Serve garnished with parsley sprigs.
